title: Total Workflow Usage in Main Rounds
description: Pooled count and share of all workflow selections across the three main rounds (N=72 selections).

title: First Voluntary Workflow Choice After Practice
description: Distribution of workflow selections in Main 1, the first main round after practice (N=24).

title: Workflow Distribution Across Main Rounds
description: Share of participants selecting each workflow in every main round. Workflow colours and order are fixed across figures.

title: Participant Workflow Trajectories Across Main Rounds
description: Each row represents one anonymous participant and each column one main round.

title: Final Practice Workflow to First Voluntary Choice
description: Transition from the final assigned practice round to the first voluntary workflow choice. Cells show participant counts and row percentages within the assigned final-practice workflow.

title: Workflow Transitions Across Main Rounds
description: Each cell shows the participant count and the percentage within the workflow selected in the preceding Main round.

title: Workflow Retention in the Next Main Round
description: Probability of choosing the same workflow in the immediately following main round.

title: Workflow Switching Behaviour Across Main Rounds
description: The left panel shows the number of switches; the right panel distinguishes stable use, switching and staying, switching back, and exploration.

title: Final Workflow Preference
description: Average and distribution of final workflow rankings from 24 participants. Rank 1 represents the strongest preference. Each participant ranked every workflow once; rankings were not weighted by the frequency of workflow use in the main rounds.

title: Final Workflow Preference and Observed Main-Round Behaviour
description: Rows show final Rank-1 preference; cells show counts and row percentages for first and most-used main-round workflows.

title: Participant Satisfaction by Round and Workflow
description: Mean round-level satisfaction by the workflow used in each round. Error bars show approximate 95% confidence intervals; labels show the number of observations. Main-round workflow means are descriptive because workflows were voluntarily selected.

title: AI Interaction Ratings by Round and Workflow
description: Mean ratings for AI understanding, collaboration, creativity support, and overall AI performance by round and AI-supported workflow. Error bars show approximate 95% confidence intervals; labels show the number of observations.

title: Raw NASA-TLX Workload Score by Workflow and Study Phase
description: Raw NASA-TLX workload scores were calculated for each participant-round as the equally weighted mean of the six NASA-TLX subscales, then summarised by workflow and rounds. Higher scores indicate greater perceived workload. Error bars show approximate 95% confidence intervals.

title: External Text Quality by Participant Satisfaction
description: Distribution of external quality-composite scores at each participant satisfaction level, shown separately for Practice and Main rounds. Boxes show interquartile ranges, individual points show participant-rounds, and connected markers show median external quality. Spearman correlations are descriptive associations pooling workflows within each study phase.

title: Overall Quality by Workflow in Practice Rounds
description: Overall-quality ratings in the randomized practice phase; points show poems, boxes show distributions, and diamonds show means with 95% confidence intervals.

title: Quality Dimensions by Workflow in Practice Rounds
description: Mean evaluator ratings by workflow and quality dimension in the randomized practice phase. Error bars show descriptive 95% confidence intervals.

title: Mixed-Workflow Direction and Quality in Practice Rounds
description: Within-participant comparison of the two mixed workflows in the randomized practice phase. Each line connects the same participant.

title: Mixed versus Solo Workflow Quality in Practice Rounds
description: Within-participant comparison of average quality across the two solo and two mixed workflows in the randomized practice phase.

title: Highest-Rated Poem Examples
description: Illustrative examples selected by the highest mean overall quality scores. They are individual cases and should not be interpreted as evidence that a workflow generally performs better.

title: Lowest-Rated Poem Examples
description: Illustrative examples selected by the lowest mean overall quality scores. They are individual cases and should not be interpreted as evidence that a workflow generally performs worse.

title: Total Completion Time by Workflow in Practice Rounds
description: Practice round completion times include pauses. Points show outputs, boxes show distributions, and diamonds show descriptive means with 95% confidence intervals.

title: Quality-Time Efficiency Profile in Practice Rounds
description: Diamonds show workflow means; horizontal and vertical error bars show descriptive 95% confidence intervals for total completion time and quality. Workflows nearer the upper-left combine higher quality with shorter completion time.

title: Complete Constraint Fulfillment Rate by Workflow in Main Rounds
description: Points show the observed percentage of main-round poems that fulfilled every task constraint. Horizontal whiskers show 95% Wilson confidence intervals. Labels show the number of fully successful rounds out of all evaluated rounds for each workflow.

title: Constraint Failure Profiles by Workflow in Main Rounds
description: Each bar represents all Main-round outputs within one selected workflow. Categories are mutually exclusive. “Line-count rule only” means that the line-count check was the sole failed requirement; “Multiple rules failed” can include the line-count rule alongside other failed checks.

title: Constraint Failure Breakdown by Type in Main Rounds
description: Failure rates by requirement type and assigned workflow. Each cell also shows the number of individual requirement checks supporting the rate.

title: Constraint Fulfillment Across Main Rounds by Error Exposure
description: Descriptive complete constraint-pass rates across Main rounds, stratified by actual error exposure. Error bars show 95% Wilson intervals.

title: Line-Count Failures in the Injected-Error Round
description: Line-count constraint failures in Main Round 1, grouped by actual error exposure and selected workflow. Error bars show 95% Wilson intervals.

title: Line-Count Failure Pattern Across Main Rounds by Error Exposure
description: Descriptive line-count failure rates across Main rounds, stratified by actual error exposure. Error bars show 95% Wilson intervals.

title: Workflow Choices in Main Round 1
description: Voluntary workflow selections in the first Main round. Participants selecting an AI-supported workflow encountered the injected-error condition.

title: Post-Error Workflow Choices by Main Round 1 Exposure
description: Distribution of voluntary workflow choices in Main Rounds 2-3 by error exposure.

title: Final Workflow Preference by Number of Reported AI Errors
description: Percentage distribution and mean rank of final workflow preferences, grouped by the number of AI errors participants reported noticing. Rank 1 indicates the strongest preference. Numbers inside sufficiently large segments show participant counts. The groups are descriptive; reporting no error does not necessarily indicate that no AI error occurred or was encountered.

title: Mean Overall Quality Across Main Rounds by Error Exposure
description: Descriptive workflow-level quality trends in Main rounds, shown separately for participants exposed and not exposed to the injected AI error in round 5.

title: Awareness of the Injected AI Error
description: Interview-coded awareness among respondents actually exposed to the injected error in Main Round 1.

title: Other AI Error Types Reported in Interviews
description: Interview-coded non-injected AI issues reported by participants. Categories are not mutually exclusive.

title: Overall-Quality Rating Distribution by Evaluator
description: Raw 1-5 overall-quality ratings assigned to the same complete set of poems by each official evaluator. Labels show poem counts.

title: Overall-Quality Ordinal Inter-Rater Agreement
description: Ordinal Krippendorff's alpha and bootstrap 95% confidence interval across all official evaluators.

title: Overall-Quality ICC Reliability
description: Absolute-agreement ICC values and 95% confidence intervals for one evaluator and the mean across the full evaluator panel.

title: Pairwise Overall-Quality Agreement
description: Pairwise quadratic-weighted Cohen's kappa, exact agreement, and within-one-point agreement for every evaluator pair.

title: Magnitude of Evaluator Disagreement
description: Distribution of the difference between the highest and lowest overall-quality rating assigned to each poem.

title: Relative Evaluator Rating Tendency
description: Mean deviation of each evaluator's rating from the average rating of the other evaluators, with 95% confidence intervals.

title: Raw Overall-Quality Rating Combinations
description: Cross-tabulations of raw 1-5 overall-quality ratings for every evaluator pair. Diagonal cells show exact agreement; off-diagonal cells show the direction and magnitude of disagreements.

title: Participant Age Distribution
description: Age distribution of study participants with mean and median marked.

title: Participant Gender Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant gender distribution shown as a pie chart with counts and percentages.

title: Participant Education Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant education distribution shown as percentages and counts.

title: Participant Native Language Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant native language distribution shown as percentages and counts.

title: Participant English Level Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant english level distribution shown as a pie chart with counts and percentages.

title: Participant Writing Confidence and AI Attitudes
description: Mean ratings for writing confidence and attitudes toward AI, shown with participant counts.
